title: deep fried
body:
A **VERY** loud and cursed-ish resource pack.
I used [this](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/minecraft-1-21-1-vanilla-default-complete-sounds-languages-panoramas/) as a template(for 1.21.1), huge thanks to the creator!

All of the sounds were processed by [SoX](https://sourceforge.net/projects/sox/) and for the images I used [ImageMagick](https://imagemagick.org/).

Most of the(new) assets were fetched by [this tool](https://github.com/rmheuer/McAssetExtractor).

Download both files from the versions tab ([here.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/deep-fried/version/0.6-NOISE-64X))

Video demo:
